```{r coverage-gaps-display, results='asis'}
# Extract coverage data from QC results
coverage_data <- if (!is.null(qc) && !is.null(qc$gene_coverage)) {
  qc$gene_coverage
} else if (!is.null(qc) && !is.null(qc$coverage_gaps)) {
  qc$coverage_gaps
} else {
  NULL
}

# Coverage threshold per ESMO Level A recommendation
min_coverage <- config$qc$min_gene_coverage %||%
                config$report$min_coverage %||%
                200

if (is.null(coverage_data)) {
  cat("\n::: {.callout-note}\nPer-gene coverage data not available. Unable to assess coverage gaps.\n:::\n")
} else {
  # Filter genes below threshold
  gaps <- if (is.data.frame(coverage_data)) {
    coverage_data |>
      filter(
        (mean_coverage %||% coverage %||% mean_depth) < min_coverage
      ) |>
      mutate(
        required_coverage = min_coverage,
        status = "BELOW THRESHOLD"
      ) |>
      select(
        Gene              = any_of(c("gene", "gene_symbol", "Gene")),
        `Mean Coverage`   = any_of(c("mean_coverage", "coverage", "mean_depth")),
        `Required Coverage` = required_coverage,
        Status            = status
      ) |>
      arrange(`Mean Coverage`)
  } else {
    tibble()
  }

  if (nrow(gaps) > 0) {
    # Warning banner
    cat(glue('
::: {{.callout-warning}}
## Coverage Gaps Detected
**{nrow(gaps)} gene(s)** fall below the ESMO Level A minimum coverage requirement
of {min_coverage}x. Variants in these regions may not be reliably detected.
Results for these genes should be interpreted with caution, and reflex testing
may be warranted.
:::
'))
    cat("\n\n")
  } else {
    cat(glue('
::: {{.callout-tip}}
## Coverage Adequate
All panel genes meet the minimum coverage requirement of {min_coverage}x.
:::
'))
    cat("\n\n")
  }
}
```

```{r coverage-gaps-table}
if (exists("gaps") && is.data.frame(gaps) && nrow(gaps) > 0) {
  gaps |>
    gt() |>
    tab_header(
      title = md("**Genes Below Coverage Threshold**"),
      subtitle = md(glue("*ESMO Level A requirement: \u2265{min_coverage}x mean coverage*"))
    ) |>
    cols_align(align = "center", columns = c(`Mean Coverage`, `Required Coverage`, Status)) |>
    fmt_number(columns = `Mean Coverage`, decimals = 0) |>
    tab_style(
      style = list(
        cell_text(weight = "bold", color = "#ffffff"),
        cell_fill(color = "#e65100")
      ),
      locations = cells_body(columns = Status)
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      locations = cells_body(columns = Gene)
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_fill(color = "#fff3e0"),
      locations = cells_body(rows = seq(1, nrow(gaps), by = 2))
    ) |>
    tab_options(
      table.width = pct(70),
      table.font.size = px(13),
      heading.align = "left",
      table.border.top.color = "#e65100",
      table.border.top.width = px(3)
    )
}
```
